name: Arequus the Shining Mars Saint
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>熒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>焅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> アレクゥス
desc: If you control a face-up card in your Spell & Trap Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Arequus the Shining Mars Saint" once per turn this way. You can only use each of the following effects of "Arequus the Shining Mars Saint" once per turn. You can target 1 face-up Spell/Trap you control; destroy both it and this card, then draw 1 card. If this card is destroyed: You can target 1 Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it.
mnst_eff: If you control a face-up card in your Spell & Trap Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Arequus the Shining Mars Saint" once per turn this way. You can only use each of the following effects of "Arequus the Shining Mars Saint" once per turn. You can target 1 face-up Spell/Trap you control; destroy both it and this card, then draw 1 card. If this card is destroyed: You can target 1 Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it.
eff: If you control a face-up card in your Spell & Trap Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Arequus the Shining Mars Saint" once per turn this way. You can only use each of the following effects of "Arequus the Shining Mars Saint" once per turn. You can target 1 face-up Spell/Trap you control; destroy both it and this card, then draw 1 card. If this card is destroyed: You can target 1 Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it.

action: Attaches itself from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
Attaches itself from your banishment as Xyz Material
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
